name: link
description: A standalone styled anchor: the Filament LinkComponent / the action LINK variant rendered as a real <a href>, with an optional leading or trailing Lucide icon and an optional trailing badge. Two variants drive the colour pair from the tokens: default (primary-coloured, underlines on hover, the shadcn link affordance) and muted (muted-foreground text darkening to full foreground on hover). A blank href degrades to an inert aria-disabled <span>; newTab opens in a new tab with rel=noopener noreferrer. Server-first PARTIAL (ADR-0012): no client state, no island, zero JS, CSP-clean. The dedicated render for io.lievit.kit.component.LinkView, which lievit-ui previously folded into the button partial.
docs: Copies the link partial to your JTE root at lievit/link.jte, reached as @template.lievit.link(label="...", href="..."). A link is a navigation affordance (distinct from button's action affordance): a text-coloured anchor, not button chrome. variant drives the colour (default=primary underline-on-hover, muted=muted-fg darkening to fg); pass label for plain text or a content slot for rich children (content wins); icon + iconPosition (leading|trailing) compose the icon partial; badge + badgeVariant compose a trailing badge partial (e.g. a count); newTab adds target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer. A blank href renders an inert aria-disabled span styled identically. Requires the icon + badge partials. The source is yours: edit freely.
